privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the Odoo 17 'odoo_scheduling' database with the calendar and contacts modules installed. The target event 'Q2 Financial Review' is a synthetic calendar event scheduled for next Monday 10:00-11:30 in Conference Room A, with attendees Alice Johnson, Bob Williams, and Henry Kim. The event initially has the description 'Review Q2 financial performance against targets.' The task requires the agent to: (1) update the description to include three specific agenda items: 'Revenue Analysis', 'Expense Report', and 'Forecasting'; (2) send a Chatter message of type 'comment' (not 'notification') containing the text 'prepare your data'. All test data is synthetic and generated at environment initialization time.
